name: Apellis Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness. Overview We are a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development and commercialization of novel therapeutic compounds to treat diseases with high unmet needs through the inhibition of the complement system, which is an integral component of the immune system.
